privileged_info_summary: The CalculatorApp is a synthetic Android calculator application with deliberately planted bugs. The baseline code uses safe toDoubleOrNull() for input parsing in onPercentPressed and onNegatePressed functions, but setup_task.sh explicitly replaces these with unsafe toDouble() calls to create crashes. The application has 4 main issues to fix: (1) percent button crashes on empty/zero input, (2) negate button crashes on empty input, (3) history display limited to 5 entries instead of requested 10, (4) no visual memory indicator in UI despite CalcEngine having memory functions. The project must compile successfully to score points. Verification scoring: 15 pts each for fixing percent and negate crashes, 15 pts for extending history to 10 entries, 20 pts for adding memory indicator, 35 pts for successful compilation. Pass threshold is 70 points out of 100.
